programme.title: Blue World Ep505: Mayan Underworld - Yucatan, Mexico
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Mexico’s Yucatan, Blue World explores remote cenotes in the jungle that were once used for Mayan rituals. Just reaching the surface of the water requires rappelling down from the forest above. But then, beneath the surface, we encounter strange alien life forms that live in total darkness, and the remains of humans and animal sacrifices from an ancient culture.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Chris and Cindy sit down with Jenn and Lanny to take a deep dive into last night’s mission. If it wasn’t difficult enough to do a full day of Surviving Mann training, an overnight mission with no breaks seems to be the cherry on top. After a refreshing 2 hours of sleep, the contestants were back at it with an Olympic-level PT session hosted by Lanny. From there, Jen fills us in on a secret new product in the next episode of Surviving Mann that reminds her of... Fembots? Stay tuned.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Ladies and gentlemen, it's time to close the deal on Beyond the Close! Join us for the grand finale and winner celebration episode, where we'll reveal the triumphant super-agent who has risen to the very top of the competition. But that's not all. Get ready to hear firsthand from the contestants themselves as they reflect on their 90-day journey and share their growth, learnings, and future aspirations. It's a night of triumph, tears, and unforgettable moments as we bid farewell to the most thrilling season yet. And as if that wasn't enough, we have a very special guest in store. The one and only Christine Quinn, star of Netflix's Selling Sunset, will be joining us for the festivities. She'll be sharing her insights on the industry and giving us a glimpse into what it takes to be a top realtor. But wait, there's more! We'll be taking you on an exclusive tour of some of Miami's most luxurious properties, hosted by none other than some of America's top developers and agents. So sit back, relax, and get ready to be transported beyond the close.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode of Boom America dives headfirst into the businesses modernizing America’s energy and infrastructure landscape. The A-Team kicks things off with Switch It Up, breaking down how smart energy upgrades - like high-efficiency lighting, EV charging, and electrical modernization - are helping companies cut costs and stay competitive. Next, the focus shifts to Raida Tech, where the team highlights a company operating years ahead of the market but in need of sharper messaging to fully unlock its potential. From there, Tangible Assets, LLC takes center stage as the experts help refine its positioning, credibility, and growth strategy in a crowded investment space. Finally, New Home National Title gets a no-nonsense diagnostic as the team maps out a clear path to scale, increase visibility, and claim its place as a national contender. From practical innovation to bold business strategy, this episode proves that the future of American enterprise is powered by smart decisions and even smarter execution.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Boom America is kicking off with a bang, led by the legendary shark himself, Kevin Harrington. Backed by his team of successful entrepreneurs, Kevin meets with businesses to jumpstart their success and take them to a whole new level. From Nuethix, a supplement line struggling with client acquisition and education, to Stream2Sea, a eco-friendly sunscreen wanting to become a household name—Kevin and the A-team are ready to jump in and get their hands dirty.

programme.title: Croatia's Plitvice Lakes - Europe's Natural Wonders Episode 2
programme.desc: Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes 🇭🇷 | Full 60-Minute 4K Nature Film ✨ Journey into one of the most magical landscapes on Earth — Plitvice Lakes National Park, Croatia’s crown jewel of cascading waterfalls, turquoise lakes, and lush alpine forests. This full-length 60-minute cinematic nature film invites you to relax and explore the mesmerizing beauty of Europe’s oldest and most breathtaking national park, filmed in stunning 4K Ultra HD. Follow the flow of crystal-clear water as it connects 16 terraced lakes through a labyrinth of waterfalls, travertine pools, and forest pathways — a symphony of nature captured in its purest form. 🎬 Presented by NatureStream.tv, creators of Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 1: Slovenia, this film is part of our global nature series designed to inspire calm, mindfulness, and appreciation for Earth’s beauty.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: Six talented poker competitors remain in the first ever WPT Ladies Championship. Lina Niu has the chip lead, but Olga Iermolcheva is right on her heels. Tension is rising as the short stacks are being forced to make their move to stay alive. It’s anyone’s game as final table action gets back underway at Wynn Las Vegas.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: One of poker’s top female earners of all time, Kathy Leibert finds herself as the shortest stack at the table with only four women remaining. Watch Kathy reach into her bag of tricks as she attempts to battle back in hopes of becoming the first ever WPT Ladies Champion.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Only three ladies remain in the battle for over $100,000 and the title of WPT Ladies Champion. Olga Iermolcheva has a commanding chip lead, but her competitors are showing no signs of backing down. Prepare for plenty of thrilling poker action under the lights at Wynn Las Vegas as we play down to the crowning of the first ever WPT Ladies Champion.

programme.title: WPT Prime Championship 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The final table of the inaugural WPT Prime Championship at Wynn Las Vegas is underway. The $2 million guaranteed prizepool event saw a record-setting turnout of 5,430 entries, nearly tripling the guarantee, which means that the eventual winner will walk away with over $700,000 and the title of the first ever WPT Prime Champion.

programme.title: WPT Prime Championship 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: We are down to the final four players of the first ever WPT Prime Championship. With so much at stake, nobody is willing to settle for anything less than first place. Over $700,000 will be awarded to the victor. Don’t miss a second of the action as WPT high stakes tournament poker action continues at Wynn Las Vegas.

programme.title: partypoker Poker Party - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: We begin our second day at Playground Poker Club in Montreal, Quebec, and the pros from partypoker face off against some of the best players in North America. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: Montreal Nights - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Our second day of filming at Playground Poker Club draws to a close as the pros from partypoker try to draw to a straight. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: Glantzing Blows - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Poker Night in America Ambassador Matt Glantz joins the partypoker table at Playground Poker Club in Montreal to see how he fares against poker luminaries from Canada and the UK. Featuring Matt Glantz, John Duthie, Mike Dentale, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.

programme.title: Mount Royal Flush - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: As our third day at Playground Poker Club in Montreal carries on, we showcase some hands we can't believe and some names we can't pronounce. Featuring Manig Loeser, John Duthie, Mike Dentale, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.

programme.title: The City of Saints - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: We conclude our final day of filming with the pros at partypoker at the Playground Poker Club in Montreal Featuring Manig Loeser, John Duthie, Jason Koon, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.

programme.title: S1E2 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Trenten Merrill, an American Paralympic long jumper who claimed bronze at the 2020 Summer Paralympics. Also featured is Casey Patterson, a powerhouse in professional beach volleyball with numerous AVP tournament wins, a gold medal on the FIVB World Tour, and an appearance at the 2016 Rio Olympics alongside Jake Gibb. Tennis legends Bob and Mike Bryan, the most successful doubles team in history, take the spotlight with 16 Grand Slam titles, 119 ATP Tour doubles victories, 438 weeks as the world’s No. 1 team, and Olympic gold in 2012. Rounding out the episode is acclaimed gymnastics coach Liang Chow, celebrated for guiding Gabby Douglas to the 2012 Olympic all-around gold and coaching Shawn Johnson to multiple medals at the 2008 Olympics.

programme.title: S1E3 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Paul Rabil, legendary professional lacrosse player and co-founder of the Premier Lacrosse League, celebrated as one of the greatest in the sport’s history. Also featured is Britney Henry, a standout track and field athlete from the University of Oregon who captured the Pac-10 Conference title in the hammer throw. Rounding out the episode is Meagan Martin, trailblazing competitor as the first female rookie to complete the American Ninja Warrior course and the first-ever Women’s Champion of the series.

programme.title: S1E1 Draft Story
programme.desc: In Part 1, we uncover the story of Tyvis Powell and the people who shaped him into the man and football player he is today. His road to the NFL was anything but easy, and it nearly never happened without the guidance of his mentor, Sean Williams. A Draft Story is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he makes the leap to professional football. Though he was not invited to Chicago for the 2016 NFL Draft, his journey is unforgettable. Witness the tension, hope, and emotion as Tyvis waits for the call that will change his life and etch the Powell name into NFL history. This is his Draft Story.

programme.title: S1 E2 Draft Story
programme.desc: A Draft Story” Part 2 is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he takes the leap into professional football. Facing unexpected challenges, honoring a promise to local kids, and navigating a situation he never imagined, Tyvis proves that the journey to the NFL is full of twists, heart, and determination.
